chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1477 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.7132/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 16-11-2021 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Salahuddin Ghumro, Mukhtiarkar Gambat..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Response has been filed by Respondent No.3; perusal whereof reflects that there appears to be some factual dispute as to the claim of the Petitioner, therefore, this Petition is not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed with pending application, whereas, the Petitioner may seek appropriate remedy in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
